ddls:
CREATE TABLE "synapses" (
  "synapse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each synapse */,
  "length" REAL /* Length of the synapse */,
  "dist_from_root" REAL /* Distance of the synapse from the root neuron */,
  "reference_neuron" TEXT /* Identifier of the reference neuron to which this synapse belongs */,
  "dataset" TEXT /* Dataset from which this synapse data originates */,
  "synapse_type" TEXT /* Type of synapse (e.g., excitatory, inhibitory) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the synapse data was recorded */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the synapse data was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the synapse (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score of the synapse data accuracy */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("synapse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_synapses_dataset FOREIGN KEY ("dataset") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "inputs" (
  "input_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input */,
  "synapse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the synapse to which this input belongs */,
  "input_neuron" TEXT /* Identifier of the input neuron connected to the synapse */,
  "input_type" TEXT /* Type of input (e.g., chemical, electrical) */,
  "input_strength" REAL /* Strength of the input signal */,
  "input_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the input signal (e.g., pre-synaptic, post-synaptic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("input_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inputs_synapse_id FOREIGN KEY ("synapse_id") REFERENCES synapses ("synapse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "outputs" (
  "output_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each output */,
  "synapse_id" INTEGER /* ID of the synapse to which this output belongs */,
  "output_neuron" TEXT /* Identifier of the output neuron connected to the synapse */,
  "output_type" TEXT /* Type of output (e.g., chemical, electrical) */,
  "output_strength" REAL /* Strength of the output signal */,
  "output_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the output signal (e.g., pre-synaptic, post-synaptic) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("output_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_outputs_synapse_id FOREIGN KEY ("synapse_id") REFERENCES synapses ("synapse_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset contents */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was created */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the dataset (e.g., lab, external collaboration) */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., institute, university) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role FOREIGN KEY ("role") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_name")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., read, write, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the collaboration (e.g., active, completed) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaboration_members" (
  "collaboration_member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration member */,
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* ID of the collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration (e.g., lead, member) */,
  "responsibilities" TEXT /* Responsibilities of the user in the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_members_collaboration_id FOREIGN KEY ("collaboration_id") REFERENCES collaborations ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaboration_members_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was created */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Date when the report was last modified */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Source of the data used in the report (e.g., dataset, synapse) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_data_source FOREIGN KEY ("data_source") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_name")
)
